entries.notes: German internal releasable. Runtime geometry reuses the existing Bavaria preset.
German internal releasable. Runtime geometry reuses the existing Saxony preset.
German internal releasable. Runtime geometry reuses the existing Schleswig-Holstein preset.
German releasable for the Bohemia-Moravia protectorate. Default 1939 baseline keeps the territory annexed by Germany; release restores the protectorate footprint excluding Sudetenland and Zaolzie.
British internal releasable. Runtime geometry reuses the existing Scotland preset.
British internal releasable. Runtime geometry reuses the existing Wales preset.
British internal releasable. Runtime geometry reuses the existing Northern Ireland preset.
French internal releasable. Runtime geometry reuses the existing Brittany preset.

boundary_variants.label: Current TNO Initial
boundary_variants.description: Current TNO-style Burgundy footprint based on Belgium, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

boundary_variants.label: Franco-Burgundian War
boundary_variants.description: Expanded Burgundy after victory over France, combining the northern TNO footprint with the eastern Burgundian block.

boundary_variants.label: Early Maximum
boundary_variants.description: Maximum early-project Burgundy, extending the expanded wartime footprint deeper into eastern and northeastern France.

entries.notes: Feature-first Generalgouvernement masks. The historical reference footprint is the only exposed RKP boundary, and the German annexation belt is handled as a separate ownership transfer.

boundary_variants.label: Historical
boundary_variants.description: Reference-map Generalgouvernement footprint using explicit feature masks.

companion_actions.label: Apply German-Annexed Polish Provinces
companion_actions.description: Transfers the historically annexed Polish belt to Germany using explicit feature masks.

entries.notes: Feature-first Ukraine mask. Historical is the only exposed boundary and includes the northeast, Donbas, Azov corridor, Kirovohrad, and Chernihiv while keeping Transnistria as a separate automatic Romania transfer.

boundary_variants.label: Historical
boundary_variants.description: Reference-map Reichskommissariat Ukraine footprint using explicit feature masks.

companion_actions.label: Transfer Transnistria To Romania
companion_actions.description: Auto-transfers the Transnistria approximation to Romania when Ukraine core territory is applied.

entries.notes: Feature-first Ostland masks. Warmia-Masuria stays with Germany, the Belarus footprint is resolved explicitly into Ostland, and Marijampole is auto-transferred to Germany when Ostland core territory is applied.

boundary_variants.label: HOI4
boundary_variants.description: HOI4-first Ostland proxy using explicit feature masks.

boundary_variants.label: Historical
boundary_variants.description: Reference-map Ostland footprint using explicit feature masks.

companion_actions.label: Transfer Marijampole To Germany
companion_actions.description: Auto-transfers Marijampole to Germany when Ostland core territory is applied.

entries.notes: Feature-first Moskowien mask. The exposed boundary is a single historical-reference footprint, including Saint Petersburg, Astrakhan, Kalmykia, the requested middle-Volga / Mari El / Komi districts, and the Belarus districts reassigned from Ostland. Greater Finland and the Russian Arctic islands are auto-transferred when Moskowien core territory is applied.

boundary_variants.label: Historical
boundary_variants.description: Reference-map Moskowien footprint using explicit feature masks.

companion_actions.label: Transfer West Karelia / West Kola To Finland
companion_actions.description: Transfers the Greater Finland reference corridor west of the White Sea / Onega / Ladoga line to Finland using explicit feature masks.

companion_actions.label: Transfer Russian Arctic Islands To Germany
companion_actions.description: Auto-transfers the Russian Arctic island districts and high-Arctic shell fragments to Germany when Moskowien core territory is applied.

entries.notes: Transcaucasia plus the North Caucasus groups represented by GER_is_RKK_state, including Dagestan but excluding Astrakhan and Kalmykia/Elista.
Manual overlay releasable for occupied Norway one-click fill.
Scenario-only historical collaboration administration for the 1939 Hebei-Chahar occupation corridor.

entries.display_name_override: Reformed Government of the Republic of China
entries.notes: Scenario-only historical collaboration administration for the 1939 Hainan occupation bridgehead.

companion_actions.label: Transfer Dalmatia + Kotor Bay To Italy
companion_actions.description: Transfers the Italian Dalmatian coastal claim bundle when Croatia core territory is applied.

entries.notes: Italy releasable for a Croatia-centered South Slav settlement. Auto-transfers Dalmatia and the Kotor Bay strip to direct Italian control.
Italy releasable for the Serbian-led inland South Slav settlement spanning Serbia, Montenegro, Macedonia, and Kosovo.

companion_actions.label: Transfer Italian Greek Islands To Italy
companion_actions.description: Transfers the Ionian Islands, Crete, and the South Aegean to direct Italian control when the Greek protectorate is applied.

entries.notes: Italy releasable for a mainland Greek protectorate that excludes the directly controlled Italian island arc.

companion_actions.label: Transfer Suez Canal Zone To Italy
companion_actions.description: Transfers the Suez canal zone to direct Italian control when Italian Egypt is applied.

entries.notes: Italy releasable for an Egyptian protectorate. Auto-transfers the Suez canal zone to direct Italian control.
Italy releasable for the Italian Palestine settlement.
Italy releasable for the Italian Transjordan settlement.
Italy releasable for the Tunisian protectorate settlement.
Italy releasable for the Syrian protectorate settlement.
Italy releasable for the Lebanese protectorate settlement.

excluded.notes: Hanover needs a dedicated Lower Saxony and Westphalia split instead of the current coarse preset set.
Rhineland requires a dedicated Rhine-West grouping that is not available as a clean runtime preset yet.
Wurttemberg needs a Baden/Wurttemberg split that does not exist as a stable runtime preset.
The current Prussia preset is an eastern-core convenience preset, not a stable HOI4 releasable boundary.
Hesse needs a dedicated central German grouping before it can be exposed safely.
Mecklenburg needs a dedicated coastal grouping instead of being folded into the current Prussia convenience preset.
Far Eastern Republic needs multiple Russian Far East groups and a cleaner Primorsky split.
Vladivostok needs a narrower coastal split than the current Primorsky hierarchy group.
Altay needs a finer Siberian republic split than the current runtime hierarchy provides.
Chuvashia needs a dedicated Volga split before it can be exposed as a releasable.
Ostyak-Vogulia needs a dedicated Khanty-Mansi plus Tyumen split.
Taymyria needs a dedicated north-central Siberian split.
Chechnya-Ingushetia needs a dedicated North Caucasus split beyond Dagestan.
Ukraine has 1936 cores across multiple parent owners and is intentionally deferred.
Belarus has 1936 cores across multiple parent owners and is intentionally deferred.
Kurdistan has 1936 cores across multiple parent owners and is intentionally deferred.
Karelia has 1936 cores across both Finland and the Soviet Union.
Colonial releasable intentionally left out of the internal-only Phase 1 scope.
Colonial releasable intentionally left out of the internal-only Phase 1 scope.
Colonial releasable intentionally left out of the internal-only Phase 1 scope.
